data.notes: 3i is primarily a proprietary capital investor (Action holding ~60% of NAV). Third-party AUM is small. FRE/DE metrics are not standard for 3i's model. Valuation driven by NAV/total return, not fee earnings.

data.notes: RITM is a hybrid: mortgage REIT + alternative asset manager (acquired Sculptor in 2024). AM metrics apply primarily to the Sculptor segment (~$34B AUM).
